copy_policy: Audit/diagnosis skill authored against the Agent Skills specification and general motion-quality heuristics. Findings are leads — verify each against real code before reporting, and route implementation fixes to the skill that owns the stack.

upstream_sources.label: Agent Skills specification and best practices.
Cross-stack motion-quality heuristics (tokenization, R3F frame-loop safety, Reanimated UI-thread safety, reduced-motion coverage, frame budget).
